commands.review_summary:
The branch moves short-term promotion details into quarterly archive markdown files, keeps `MEMORY.md` as a compact pointer, updates memory CLI/docs/events, and rewrites memory-core tests.

PR surface: Source -187, Tests -921, Docs +7. Total -1101 across 13 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review findings: source inspection of the PR head shows uncapped archive writes, missing recall-store retention, catch-all phase-signal recovery, and missing JSON archive fields. I did not run a live workspace reproduction in this read-only review.
